description: Bootstrap placeholder for NeoTrade3 data source registry (independent from NeoTrade2 runtime)

sources.notes: External universe source provided via file upload; may be missing on some days. Must be validated and audited before use.
Used for placeholder candidate and ledger scaffolding during bootstrap; not an official production data store.
Paid Tushare anns_d endpoint for system-wide company announcement capture and later downstream normalization.
Paid Tushare npr endpoint for policy and regulation capture used by sector-board and policy-context reasoning.
Paid Tushare research_report, report_rc, and stk_surv endpoints for broker research, forecast, and institutional-attention capture.
Paid Tushare ETF endpoints including etf_basic, fund_daily, rt_etf_k, etf_share_size, etf_index, index_weight, and fund_portfolio.
